# API Specification

This is the API specification for the spec detailed in .agent-os/specs/2026-05-04-phase-2-intelligence-layer/spec.md

## Changed Endpoints

### POST /api/thoughts (Updated Response)

Response body now includes enrichment fields:
```json
{
  "id": "string (GUID)",
  "text": "string",
  "createdAt": "2026-05-04T14:30:00.000+00:00",
  "tags": ["Stress", "Trading"],
  "sentiment": "Negative",
  "intensityScore": 0.72
}
```

### GET /api/thoughts (Updated Response)

Each item in `items[]` now includes enrichment fields:
```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "text": "string",
      "createdAt": "2026-05-04T14:30:00.000+00:00",
      "tags": ["Work"],
      "sentiment": "Neutral",
      "intensityScore": 0.1
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "pageSize": 20,
  "totalCount": 42,
  "hasNextPage": true
}
```

## New Endpoints

### GET /api/thoughts/{id}

**Purpose:** Retrieve a single thought entry with full enrichment metadata for the authenticated user.
**Authorization:** Required (`[Authorize]`)
**Route Parameters:**
- `id` (string, required) — GUID of the thought

**Response:** `200 OK`
```json
{
  "id": "string (GUID)",
  "text": "string",
  "createdAt": "2026-05-04T14:30:00.000+00:00",
  "tags": ["Stress", "Trading"],
  "sentiment": "Negative",
  "intensityScore": 0.72
}
```
**Errors:**
- `404 Not Found` — thought does not exist or belongs to a different user
```json
{
  "correlationId": "guid",
  "status": "404",
  "title": "Not Found",
  "detail": "The requested thought was not found.",
  "source": {}
}
```

## Updated Request/Response Models

**File:** `src/AntarMindAI.Api/Controllers/Thoughts/ThoughtModels.cs`

```csharp
// Modified by AI on 05/04/2026. Edit #1.

    string Id,
    string Text,
    DateTimeOffset CreatedAt,
    IReadOnlyList<string> Tags,
    string Sentiment,
    double IntensityScore);
```
